The Netherlands (NL) summary:
  • Bandwidth Capacity: ~188.97 Gbit/s (61.95 Gbit/s guard capacity, 34.83 Gbit/s middle capacity, 92.19 Gbit/s exit capacity)
  • Network Influence: 17.59% of overall consensus weight (10.82% guard, 27.39% middle, and 22.55% exit)
  • Network Position: Exit-focused (990 total relays, 325 guards, 176 middles, 489 exits)
